productName: Refine Infused HASH Joint - Quickz x Permanent Marker
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Quickz x Permanent Marker, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, chemical, and tobacco, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
